'''Veermok Clan''' was an [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|initiate]] training clan of the [[New Jedi Order]] that was usually made up of children between the ages of 13 to 14 years old. This clan was named after the [[Veermok/Legends|Veermok]], a creature native to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] the members of the Veermok Clan were taken hostage during a [[Battle of Ossus (Second Galactic Civil War)|raid on the Jedi Academy]]. They were later rescued and taken to the [[Jedi Outpost]] on [[Endor/Legends|Endor's Sanctuary Moon]].

==Appearances==
